message:
fix(node): remove unused imports in main.rs and fix push_bounded capacity in ScenarioBuilder

main.rs:
- Remove three unused `self` imports (api::self, policy::self,
  security::self) that became dead after the prior refactor moved module
  declarations to lib.rs. Only the specific sub-items are now imported.

scenario_builder.rs:
- Introduce MAX_NODES_CAP (4096) as the Vec capacity bound for
  push_bounded(), distinct from MAX_NODES (10) which is the semantic
  validation limit. The previous commit used MAX_NODES directly as the
  push_bounded cap, which would silently discard nodes at index 10+
  before build() could validate and return a proper TooManyNodes error.
  Using a generous capacity bound lets the validation layer produce
  meaningful diagnostics rather than silently truncating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
